About SOS Roofing Co

12+ years serving Tampa and surrounding areas

SOS Roofing Co was founded on a simple principle: provide homeowners in Tampa Bay with roofing services they can trust, no matter the storm. We've seen firsthand the damage our harsh Florida weather can inflict, from hurricane-force winds to relentless sun and rain. That's why we're committed to delivering durable, reliable roofs built to withstand everything Tampa throws our way.

We're not just roofers; we're problem solvers. We take a comprehensive approach to every project, starting with a thorough inspection to identify potential issues and recommending the best solutions for your specific needs and budget. Our team uses only the highest-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure a long-lasting, weather-resistant roof.

SOS Roofing Co is proud to be a part of the Tampa community. We believe in giving back, supporting local initiatives, and treating every customer like a neighbor. When you choose us, you're not just getting a new roof; you're getting a partner dedicated to protecting your home for years to come.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
SOS Roofing Co

Trusted roofing contractor professionals serving Tampa, FL and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
